wiki.summary: A short description about the song by YouTube user "Kancer Boyz" (goo.gl/KY4POQ) - "On “In Ailes,” Bousfield borrows vocal samples from a recording of The Threepenny Opera—a 1931 musical critique of capitalism by the Marxist dramatist Bertolt Brecht—playing them in reverse to make disgorged vocal melodies. Over rattling drums and an explosive synth riff, the backwards vocals come across like subliminal social commentary about a society gone mad.﻿" Read more on Last.fm.

Over rattling drums and an explosive synth riff, the backwards vocals come across like subliminal social commentary about a society gone mad.﻿" Read more on Last.fm.
